component.name: Deskpair
component.summary: Turn any device into a second monitor for GNOME Linux

description.p: Deskpair is a control panel and installer for touchvnc-gnome, a VNC server that creates a virtual second display on GNOME Linux desktops. Connect from a tablet, phone, or laptop using any VNC client, and it appears as a real monitor — drag windows to it, extend your workspace, and interact with full touch, mouse, and keyboard support.

ul.li: Virtual second display that appears as a real monitor in GNOME Settings
Multi-touch support with up to 10 simultaneous touch points
Full mouse and keyboard input with proper keysym-to-evdev translation
Works on both Wayland (Mutter RemoteDesktop) and X11 (xrandr)
Configurable resolution to match your device
Mirror mode to share an existing screen
Low latency PipeWire-based frame capture
QR code for quick connection from mobile devices
Installation wizard that checks dependencies and builds from source
TLS encryption and authentication support
System tray integration with autostart

screenshot.caption: Dashboard with server controls and connection info
Settings panel with display and security options

ul.li: Fix Flatpak crash caused by missing libappindicator3 (tray disabled)
Fix binary name in .deb package (renamed to deskpair)
Remove build-from-source step in wizard (binary is now bundled)
Bundle touchvnc-gnome binary with shared libraries
Use GNOME 47 Flatpak runtime
Add Code of Conduct, Contributing guide, Security policy
Add issue templates and PR template
Add GitHub Pages landing page
Installation wizard with dependency detection and build from source
Dashboard with server start/stop, QR code, and connection info
Settings for display, network, security, and input
System tray integration
TLS certificate generation
Real-time log viewer
